visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video opens with a 2D animation style. A bald-headed character with a serious expression and minor blemishes on his face stares directly at the camera against a solid black background. (2) The scene transitions to a military-themed environment with a wooden fence and green trees in the background. A character in a camouflage uniform and green helmet looks distressed, sweating and clenching his jaw. (3) A sequence of close-ups shows the character's face in a mirror, highlighting red acne spots on his chin and nose. Another character's torso in a green shirt is partially visible. (4) The character holds a handheld mirror, his eyes becoming large, blue, and teary in a classic anime emotional style. A small circular inset appears showing the face of a different, more composed character. (5) A product showcase occurs against a bright blue watery background with floating bubbles. Two items appear: a tube of 'PAIR ACNE Creamy Foam' and a bottle of 'PAIR ACNE Clean Lotion'. (6) The main character is shown applying a thick layer of white cleansing foam to his face, with blue motion lines in the background indicating action. (7) The character is shown again with sparkling, smooth skin and a look of shock and delight. (8) The video concludes with a brand logo and the product images displayed prominently with text overlays on a white and blue background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 你有臉部的困擾嗎. [Variety]: 要突然 jump scare. (2) [Subtitle]: 沒錯，在我當兵的時候. [Subtitle]: 因為我在南部當兵. (3) [Subtitle]: 天氣炎熱 壓力超大. [Subtitle]: 幾乎晚上都會睡不太好. (4) [Subtitle]: 有一天早上. [Subtitle]: 好累喔…等等又要去跑步… [Subtitle]: 好想要放假喔…. (5) [Subtitle]: 幹嘛啊！叫什麼叫！ [Subtitle]: 我…. (6) [Subtitle]: 我青春期來了. [Subtitle]: 什麼鬼. (7) [Subtitle]: 沒錯，我滿臉直接充滿痘痘. [Subtitle]: 而且都是長在劇痛的地方. (8) [Subtitle]: 下巴，鼻頭跟. [Subtitle]: 上巴. (9) [Subtitle]: 怎麼辦，怎麼辦我22歲又開始長痘痘了啦. [Subtitle]: 吼呦，我要毀容了啦. (10) [Subtitle]: 為什麼語氣也變成青春期少女. [Subtitle]: 不然你試試看這個. (11) [Subtitle]: 什麼東西？ [Logo]: PAIR ACNE Creamy Foam. [Logo]: PAIR ACNE Clean Lotion. (12) [Subtitle]: PAIR 淨痘調理洗面乳以及皮脂調理化妝水！ [Subtitle]: 你那個痘痘屬於成人痘. (13) [Subtitle]: 不要再用肥皂洗臉了. [Subtitle]: 選對產品才能有效解決啦. [Variety]: (被洗臉聲). (14) [Subtitle]: 而且這個含有IPMP淨痘成分. [Subtitle]: 可以讓肌膚清潔溜溜. (15) [Subtitle]: 搭配化妝水一起用. [Subtitle]: 還能調整肌膚狀態. (16) [Subtitle]: 達到油水平衡唷. [Subtitle]: OH MY GOD 我的臉. (17) [Subtitle]: 也太光滑細緻了吧. [Subtitle]: 這是日本熱銷的淨痘品牌. (18) [Subtitle]: 在臺灣買很優惠欸. [Subtitle]: 你休假可以去藥妝店或上網買啊. (19) [Subtitle]: 哦哦好，我放假就去買. [Subtitle]: 所以我的青春期要結束了嗎. (20) [Subtitle]: 早就結束了. [Logo]: LION 獅王. [Logo]: PAIR. [Slogan]: 日本專業淨痘品牌. [Subtitle]: 提供 life.love.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main animated characters; no real humans.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A bald-headed male animated character wearing a black t-shirt or a green military-style shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Varies between a solid black void, a forest background for military barracks, an indoor room with a mirror and window, and a graphic blue watery backdrop for product promotion.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-arousal male vocal begins narration over an energetic, upbeat pop BGM. The voice is clear and studio-quality. (2) A sharp 'whoosh' sound effect punctuates a scene transition, accompanied by a slight shift in the BGM's intensity. (3) Cartoonish 'ding' and 'pop' SFX are timed with the visual appearance of acne spots on screen. The narrator's voice adopts a more dramatic, mock-serious tone. (4) Rapid dialogue between two characters occurs; one voice is distressed and high-pitched, the other is calmer. Playful 'sparkle' SFX appear during transitions. (5) Bubbling and watery splashing sound effects dominate as the product is applied in the animation. The BGM remains consistent in tempo. (6) A bright chime or magic-like sparkle SFX is heard as the character's skin is revealed to be clean. The narrator's tone shifts to highly positive and promotional. (7) Brand mention and final jingle-like musical phrase occur as the BGM cuts off abruptly with the end of the video.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To promote LION's 'PAIR ACNE' skincare products by using a relatable animated story about a soldier developing adult acne and finding relief through the brand's cleanser and lotion.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly names and shows the products 'PAIR ACNE Creamy Foam' and 'Clean Lotion' as the solution to the character's problem, ending with a official brand logo for LION.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A highly engaging short-form promotional animation that combines comedic storytelling with direct product marketing, tailored for a social media audience.
